case_title: CHAVEZ, MONICA VS SANCHEZ, ROBERTO et al

docket_entries.description: PLTF'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COST SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-1999, OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, LUPE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, MONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ROBERTO SANCHEZ, LUPE SANCHEZ, JULIANA ALCAZAR, SECUNDINO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF MONICA CHAVEZ REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSION- ER FOR REVEIW AFTER 15 DAYS.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPLICATION IS DENIED FOR THE FOLLOWING REASONS: CLAIMENT HAS SUFFICIENT ASSETS TO PAY FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS. SIGNED BY
